description: Style NoteThe luxe comfort and rugged styling of gliders' shoes are now replicated in its floaters as well. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.Product DetailsBlunt toed floaters in black and blue with an upraised heel and ankle loop straps with Velcro closuresFoamy thick rubber footbedThick TPU outsole with an upraised heel and multi directional lugs, comes with a carry bagMaterial and CareSynthetic and fabricDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
